run the build on full pipeline

message: fixes issues with WashPost county encoding that was breaking ingestion
update all metadata files tofill in source info and ensure proper formatting; correct formatting on newer process.json files
run the build on full pipeline
init provisional mortality for opioid OD

nchs_vsrr_provisional.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (NCHS)
nchs_vsrr_provisional.name: VSRR Provisional Drug Overdose Death Counts
nchs_vsrr_provisional.description: Provisional counts for drug overdose deaths from the National Vital Statistics System. Provisional counts may be incomplete and causes may be pending investigation; methods exist to adjust for reporting delays. Data updated monthly.
nchs_vsrr_provisional.restrictions: Public domain. CDC/NCHS data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

nvss_21_causes.name: NVSS - 21 Cause of Death Groupings (state-level)
nvss_21_causes.description: State-level counts grouped into the standard 21 cause categories (from NVSS)
nvss_21_causes.restrictions: Public domain. CDC/NCHS data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.
